headline: Japan Overhauls Crypto Rules Amid $2Tr Market Volatility

article.title: Japan passes crypto overhaul to bring digital assets under financial rules
article.summary: Japan’s revised Financial Instruments and Exchange Act introduces crypto insider trading rules, tougher penalties and new oversight requirements for crypto businesses.

headline: Korea Regulates $200B Crypto Assets Under New System

article.summary: South Korea’s Economy Ministry plans to include digital assets and intellectual property under the country’s new state-asset management framework.

headline: Bitcoin Softfork Falters Amid 20% Data Surge

article.title: The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
Bitcoin’s real power is that anyone willing to pay fees can write to the ledger. BIP-110’s backers want to change that for data-heavy transactions. The backlash reveals what’s truly at stake.

headline: Ethereum Privacy Unit Spins Off $1Bn EthSystems Venture

headline: US, UK Unveil Stablecoin Rules Amid $1T Market

headline: Japan Cuts Crypto Tax Rate to 20%

article.summary: The amendments establish the basis for separate crypto taxation at a rate of approximately 20%, down from the current maximum 55% rate.
